lines.english: Why did the police have to push Jumbo off the main street?
lines.chinese: 为什么警察不得不把Jumbo从大街上推开？
lines.raw: Why did the police have to push Jumbo off the main street? | 为什么警察不得不把Jumbo从大街上推开？

lines.english: Last Christmas, the circus owner, Jimmy Gates, decided to take some presents to a children's hospital.
lines.chinese: 去年圣诞节，马戏团老板吉米·盖茨决定给一家儿童医院送些礼物。
lines.raw: Last Christmas, the circus owner, Jimmy Gates, decided to take some presents to a children's hospital. | 去年圣诞节，马戏团老板吉米·盖茨决定给一家儿童医院送些礼物。

lines.english: Dressed up as Father Christmas and accompanied by a 'guard of honour' of six pretty girls,
lines.chinese: 他打扮成圣诞老人，由六个漂亮女孩组成的“仪仗队”陪同，
lines.raw: Dressed up as Father Christmas and accompanied by a 'guard of honour' of six pretty girls, | 他打扮成圣诞老人，由六个漂亮女孩组成的“仪仗队”陪同，

lines.english: he set off down the main street of the city riding a baby elephant called Jumbo.
lines.chinese: 骑着一头名叫Jumbo的小象，沿着城市的主街出发了。
lines.raw: he set off down the main street of the city riding a baby elephant called Jumbo. | 骑着一头名叫Jumbo的小象，沿着城市的主街出发了。

lines.english: He should have known that the police would never allow this sort of thing.
lines.chinese: 他本该知道警察绝不会允许这种事情发生。
lines.raw: He should have known that the police would never allow this sort of thing. | 他本该知道警察绝不会允许这种事情发生。

lines.english: A policeman approached Jimmy and told him he ought to have gone along a side street as Jumbo was holding up the traffic.
lines.chinese: 一名警察走近吉米，告诉他本该走小巷，因为Jumbo正在阻碍交通。
lines.raw: A policeman approached Jimmy and told him he ought to have gone along a side street as Jumbo was holding up the traffic. | 一名警察走近吉米，告诉他本该走小巷，因为Jumbo正在阻碍交通。

lines.english: Though Jimmy agreed to go at once, Jumbo refused to move.
lines.chinese: 尽管吉米同意立即离开，但Jumbo却拒绝移动。
lines.raw: Though Jimmy agreed to go at once, Jumbo refused to move. | 尽管吉米同意立即离开，但Jumbo却拒绝移动。

lines.english: Fifteen policemen had to push very hard to get him off the main street.
lines.chinese: 十五名警察不得不非常用力地推，才把他弄下主街。
lines.raw: Fifteen policemen had to push very hard to get him off the main street. | 十五名警察不得不非常用力地推，才把他弄下主街。

lines.english: The police had a difficult time, but they were most amused.
lines.chinese: 警察们费了好大劲，但他们都觉得很有趣。
lines.raw: The police had a difficult time, but they were most amused. | 警察们费了好大劲，但他们都觉得很有趣。

lines.english: 'Jumbo must weigh a few tons,' said a policeman afterwards,
lines.chinese: “Jumbo肯定有几吨重，”一名警察事后说，
lines.raw: 'Jumbo must weigh a few tons,' said a policeman afterwards, | “Jumbo肯定有几吨重，”一名警察事后说，

lines.english: 'so it was fortunate that we didn't have to carry him.
lines.chinese: “所以我们不必抬他真是幸运。
lines.raw: 'so it was fortunate that we didn't have to carry him. | “所以我们不必抬他真是幸运。

lines.english: Of course, we should arrest him, but as he has a good record, we shall let him off this time.'
lines.chinese: 当然，我们应该逮捕他，但鉴于他表现良好，这次我们就放过他了。”
lines.raw: Of course, we should arrest him, but as he has a good record, we shall let him off this time.' | 当然，我们应该逮捕他，但鉴于他表现良好，这次我们就放过他了。”
